key_provisions.heading: 6.1 All Aboriginal settlements are to have an endorsed Layout Plan.
key_provisions.summary: 6.2 Layout Plans may be prepared for Aboriginal communities that exhibit special circumstances,

key_provisions.heading: 6.11 The WAPC may endorse a Layout Plan if—
key_provisions.summary: (a) the Layout Plan is consistent with the provisions of this policy;

key_provisions.heading: 6.15 Amendments to layout plans are to be recorded on the map-set.
